form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up didn't finish the race at Turfway Park January 21 over 1609m. Second run from a spell 5th of 7 at Gulfstream Park on March 12 over 1609m, 13 len behind Dry Powder carrying 55kg at $11.10. Better than that recent lacklustre performance suggests.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation second last in a small field at Churchill Downs in the LR September 20 over 1710m, 6 len behind Immersive carrying 53.5kg at $5.13. When resuming last campaign ran last of 8 at Aqueduct in the LR March 1 2025 over 1609m, 23 len behind Drexel Hill carrying 53.5kg at $3.20. Will struggle against these.

form.formComment: Returns from a 32-day let-up. At the latest run 5th of 7 at Turfway Park on March 7 over 1207m, 3.5 len behind Frango Electrico carrying 54.5kg at $2.76. The race before that ran last in a small field at Turfway Park on February 11 over 1609m, 11 len behind Fantastical with 56kg at $13.13. Thereabouts last time but others are preferred.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Not raced for 48 days. First-up won by 5 len at Tampa Bay Downs January 23 over 1207m defeating Tennesseehoneybee carrying 50.5kg at $2.10. Second run from a spell won by 5 len at Gulfstream Park February 19 over 1207m defeating Chatter carrying 52.5kg at $3. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 60 days. Last outing 3rd in a small field at Fairgrounds on February 7 over 1710m, 13 len behind Conch Fried Rice with 54.5kg at $3.60. At only start last preparation 4th in a small field at Churchill Downs on November 5 over 1408m, 3 len behind Hush It Honey carrying 53.5kg at $5.08. Improver with winning prospects.

form.formComment: Returns from a 40-day let-up. At the latest run won by 1.3 len at Aqueduct February 27 over 1609m defeating Pistol Liz Ablazen with 55kg at $2.42. The race before that ran last of 9 at Aqueduct on January 22 over 1308m, 17 len behind With The Angels carrying 55kg at $46.36. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 10 months 7th of 9 at Fairgrounds Turf on March 7 over 1106m, 13 len behind She's A Tempest with 54.5kg at $9.90. Previously second-up won by 11 len at Churchill Downs May 30 over 1609m defeating Promisemeanempire with 56kg at $4.52. Worth another chance.
